verses.text: Josiah' tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a ukzawh kum li a phakna kumin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Laizial khat la in la, tua sungah Josiah kumpi a suah kum, nang kong hopih masak huna kipan tuni ciangdong Israel gam leh gamdang khempeuhte' langkhatah ka thugente khempeuh gelh in

Judah mite in amau' tungah tun'sak dingin ka ngaihsut siatna khempeuh za-in, mi khempeuh in a siatna uh panin kiheina-in nei khathei ding uh a, keimah in zong amau' khialhna leh amau' mawhnate ka maisak thei khading hi,” a hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong Neriah' tapa Baruk ka sam a, Topa in keima tungah a hong gen khitsa thu khempeuh sitin Baruk in laizial khat tungah a gelh hi
Tua ciangin Baruk ka sawl a, “ Topa' biakinn-ah a pai dingin kei hong kiphal nawnlo ahih manin

nang va pai in la, an tan' ni ciangin Topa' biakinn sungah a om mi khempeuhte' zak dingin ka hong sit hih laizial sungah na at Topa' kammalte na va sim ding hi. Amau' khuapite pana hong paikhia Judah mi khempeuhte' zakin zong na sim ding hi

Topa' tungah amaute thumin a vekpi-un a hoihlohna uh panin a kihei thei khading uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite' tungah Topa in tun'sak dingin a gensa a hehna leh a thangpaihna lian mahmah hi,” ka ci hi
Topa' biakinn sungah laizial sunga Topa' kammal simkhiat dingin ka sawl bangbangin Neriah' tapa Baruk in zong a hih hi

Josiah' tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakim in a ukzawh kum nga a phak kum, a kha kuana kha-in Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuh leh Judah gam khuapite panin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai mi khempeuh in Topa' maipha ngahna dingin an a tang uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' biakinnsung, a Kongpi Thak tumna gei, a dei tungnunga Shafan' tapa thuvanpipa Gemariah' inndei sungah mi khempeuh' zakin Baruk in laizial sunga ka gelhsak kammalte a simkhia hi
Gemariah' tapa, Shafan' tupa ahi Mikaiah in laizial sunga thu teng khempeuh a zak ciangin

kumpipa' innsung, thuvanpipa' inndei sungah paisuk a, tua lai munah thuvanpipa Elishama, Shemaiah' tapa Delaiah, Akbor' tapa Elnathan, Shafan' tapa Gemariah, leh Hananiah' tapa Zedekiah-te-a kipan kumpi ulian khempeuh tu-in na om uh hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, mi khempeuh' zakin Baruk in a sim a zaksa thu teng khempeuh a gen hi

Tua ciangin kumpi ulian khempeuh in, Kushi' tusawn ahi, Shelemiah' tupa, Nethaniah' tapa Jehudi, Baruk kiangah sawl uh a, “Mite kiangah na sim na laizial hong la in la hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi. Tua ciangin Neriah' tapa Baruk in zong tua laizial la-in amaute kiangah hong paipih hi
Amaute in, “Tu in la hong sim dih in,” ci-in a gen uh hi. Baruk in zong amaute kiangah a sim hi
Tua thute khempeuh a zak khit uh ciangin lau-in khatlekhat ki-en gapgap uh a, Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah i koh kul ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh bangci at na hi hiam? Jeremiah in hong sit ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Baruk in zong, “Amah in hih thu khempeuh hong sit a, ke'n zong laizial sungah laitui tawh ka at hi,” ci-in a dawngkik hi
Tua ciangin kumpi uliante in Baruk kiangah, “Pai in la, nang leh Jeremiah va bu un. Na omna mun uh kuamah theisak kei un,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in thuvanpipa Elishama' inndei sungah tua laizial koih uh a, kumpipa' omna inndei sungah a lut khit uh ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua thu khempeuh a gen uh hi
Kumpipa in zong tua laizial a la dingin Jehudi sawl a, amah in thuvanpipa Elishama' inndei sung pan a va lakhia hi. Kumpipa leh kumpipa kiangah a ding ulian khempeuhte' zakin Jehudi in a sim hi
Kha kua kha pen phalbi laitak ahih manin kumpipa zong a phalbi inn sungah tu-in, meikhuka meikuang a awi hi
Jehudi in khawk thum khawk li bang a sim khit ciangin kumpipa in temta neu khat tawh atkhia a, meikhuk sungah a khul hi. Tua bangin laizial buppi a kattum dong meikhuk sungah a paipai hi
Ahih hangin kumpipa ahi a, hih thute a za khin a nasemte khat beek ahi zongin lau tuanloin, kisik kiklo uh ahih manin a puan uh a balkek kei uh hi
Elnathan, Delaiah, leh Gemariah in kumpipa in laizial a hallohna ding a khoh uh hangin amah in a mang kei hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in kumpipa' tapa Jerahmeel pen Azriel' tapa Seraiah leh Abdeel' tapa Shelemiah tawh, ka lai-at Baruk leh keimah a man dingin thu a pia hi. Ahih hangin Topa in kote gel a hong seelsim hi
Keima sit bangin Baruk in a at laizial kumpipa in a haltum khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Laizial dang khat la in la tua tungah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a haltum a masa laizial sunga thu omteng khempeuh atkik in

Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim' thu tawh kisai-in hih bangin ama kiangah va gen in: ‘ Topa in hong genin-ah: Nangmah in, “Jeremiah aw, bang hangin Babylon kumpipa hong pai taktakin hih gam hong susia ding a, mihing leh ganhing a tengsak nawn kei ding hi, ci-in hih lai sungah at na hi hiam?” ci-in na gen a, tua laizial na haltum hi

Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim' thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin-ah, amah in David tokhom tunga tu ding suanlekhak a nei kei ding a, ama luanghawm pen sun laitakin nisa' kap ding leh zan laitakin vukngo' tuam dingin kipaidak ding hi

Amah leh a suanlekhakte leh a nasemte a mawhna uh hangin gim ka pia ding a, ama tung leh Jerusalem khua-a tengte tunga kipan Judah mite' tungah amau' tungah tun'sak dingin ka gensa gimna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thu hong ngailo uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” ci-in kei a hong sawl hi

Tua ciangin kei zong laizial dang khat la leuleu-in Neriah' tapa lai-at Baruk ka pia hi. Amah in zong Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in meikhuk sungah a khul tumsa laizial sunga thu ki-at khempeuh, keima sit bangbangin a at hi. A thu kibang tampi zong ka gelhbeh sak hi.
